{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Void Snare
| introduced = Skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Void Snare]] is a technique inside [[Lindon]]'s purple bracelet.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c4">''Skysworn'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Void Snare]] is a technique used by [[Lindon]] that uses purple lines.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c6">''Skysworn'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
